title: Vanilla Combat Improvements
description: Adds 6 new weapons with custom abilities and effects that refresh vanilla combat.
body:
This project, was originally designed for a small server of friends. It incorporates a new feel on vanilla combat and diversifies playstyles with new weapons and crafting recipes.

Adds **5** New Weapons:
- Battleaxe
  
- Rapier
  
- Greatsword
  
- Morning Star
  
- Dagger
  
----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Adds **2** New Items:
- Weapon Handle
  
- Steel Plating

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Adds **3** Custom Effects:
**Bleed** - Damage over time effect

**Stun** - Restricts movement for a brief period of time

**Cooldown** - A universal cooldown potion effect for weapon abilites

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
**Two-Handed** Weapons:

Both the Greatsword and Battleaxe are two-handed weapons, which require the offhand to be empty to use.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Sound Effects** and **Weapon Abilities:**

**Rapier** - Dash, deals damage

**Greatsword** - AOE smash, debuffs enemies and inflicts stun

**Battleaxe** - Deals stun on full hit

**Morning Star** - strikes lightning when hitting

**Dagger** - inflicts bleed

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**STATS for nerds:**
- **Greatsword:** 1.3 Attack Speed
  
  Sweep: Medium-low damage, high debuffs, high AOE and long cooldown
  
  Iron - 9 Damage
  
  Diamond - 11 Damage
  
  Netherite - 14 Damage
  
- **Rapier:** 1.7 Attack Speed
  
  Dash: low cooldown, long range, (only netherite: deals damage, wither and bleed) 
  
  Iron - 4.5 Damage
  
  Diamond - 5.5 Damage
  
  Netherite - 7.5 Damage
  
- **Morning Star:** 1.4 Attack Speed
  
  Lightning: A chance to strike lightning when swinging

  Iron - 6.5 Damage, 40% Chance

  Diamond - 7.5 Damage, 50% Chance

  Netherite - 8.5 Damage, 70% Change

- **Battle Axe:** 0.5 Attack Speed
  
  Stunning blows: Deals stun every hit

  Iron - 13 Damage

  Diamond - 15 Damage

  Netherite - 17.5 Damage

- **Dagger:** 2.5 Attack Speed
  
  Bleed: Deals 1.5 seconds of bleed every hit

  Iron - 3 Damage, Bleed I

  Diamond - 4 Damage, Bleed II

  Netherite - 5 Damage, Bleed III and Wither II
